title: Senior Software Engineer
description: We're looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our platform team. You'll be working on distributed systems and helping scale our infrastructure.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in software development
Proficiency in Python, Go, or Java

title: Software Engineer Intern
description: We're looking for talented and motivated students to join our AI agents team. You'll be working on AI agents that scrape LinkedIn for potential candidates.
requirements: 1+ years of experience in Python, C++, Java, or another general-purpose programming language
Experience with data scraping and cleaning

title: Marketing Intern
description: We're looking for talented and motivated students to join our marketing team. You'll be working on social media marketing campaigns and helping us grow our brand.
requirements: Experience with social media marketing, SEO, and SEM

title: Frontend Developer
description: Join our creative team building modern web applications. You'll work closely with designers to create beautiful, responsive user interfaces.
requirements: Expert knowledge of React or Vue

title: Marketing Manager
description: Lead our marketing initiatives and drive brand awareness. You'll manage campaigns across multiple channels and work with cross-functional teams.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Help us build and maintain our cloud infrastructure. You'll work on CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, and monitoring systems.
requirements: Strong knowledge of AWS or GCP
Scripting skills in Bash or Python

title: HR Coordinator
description: Support our HR team with recruitment, onboarding, and employee relations. Great opportunity for someone starting their HR career.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in HR or related field

title: Account Executive
description: Drive revenue growth by acquiring new enterprise clients. You'll manage the full sales cycle from prospecting to closing deals.

title: Software Engineer Intern - Core Backend
description: We are looking for a talented and motivated software engineer intern to join our core backend team. This will be a highly demanding role.
